purpose: Per-kind freshness budgets and digest requirements for the small set of trust artifacts that gate the canonical loop. Digest signals (producer_input_digest, source_artifact_digest) take priority over timestamp budgets. Unknown freshness fails closed unless allow_unknown is explicitly set.

artifact_tier_policy.rationale: Tier policy is durable; digest of canonical inputs is the strong proof. Timestamp budget is generous because the policy file rarely changes.

reason_code_alias_map.rationale: Alias map is durable; lifecycle changes (deprecated/forbidden) must be detectable. Digest is preferred.

certification_evidence_index.rationale: Evidence index is per-trace; freshness must mirror the trace it covers. Stale or unknown evidence indexes block certification.

loop_proof_bundle.rationale: Proof bundle is per-trace; must reflect the current evidence index and failure trace.

failure_trace.rationale: Failure trace is per-run; require either digest or recent timestamp.

replay_lineage_join_summary.rationale: Join summary must be regenerated alongside the replay/lineage records it cross-references.

slo_signal_policy.rationale: Signal policy is durable but must be digest-verified so promotion of an observation to a hard signal is auditable.
